children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established in the Department of Health and Human Services an Office of International Relations.
good manufacturing practice regulations promulgated under , andsection 360j(f) of this title
other regulations and testing protocols as the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

The Secretary shall support the Office of the United States Trade Representative, in consultation with the Secretary of Commerce, in meetings with representatives of other countries to discuss methods and approaches to reduce the burden of regulation and harmonize regulatory requirements if the Secretary determines that such harmonization continues consumer protections consistent with the purposes of this chapter.

The Secretary shall support the Office of the United States Trade Representative, in consultation with the Secretary of Commerce, in efforts to move toward the acceptance of mutual recognition agreements relating to the regulation of drugs, biological products, devices, foods, food additives, and color additives, and the regulation of good manufacturing practices, between the European Union and the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary shall regularly participate in meetings with representatives of other foreign governments to discuss and reach agreement on methods and approaches to harmonize regulatory requirements.

children.label: i
children.text: provide guidance to such fora on strategies, policies, directions, membership, and other activities of a forum as appropriate;

children.label: ii
children.text: to the extent appropriate, solicit, review, and consider comments from industry, academia, health care professionals, and patient groups regarding the activities of such fora; and

children.label: iii
children.text: to the extent appropriate, inform the public of the Secretary’s activities within such fora, and share with the public any documentation relating to a forum’s strategies, policies, and other activities of such fora.

With respect to devices, the Secretary may, when appropriate, enter into arrangements with nations regarding methods and approaches to harmonizing regulatory requirements for activities, including inspections and common international labeling symbols.
Paragraphs (1) through (4) shall not apply with respect to products defined in .section 321(ff) of this title
